description_long: This is a high-top canvas sneaker in an off-white color, featuring a classic Converse Chuck Taylor All Star design. The shoe has green criss-cross laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a white rubber toe cap with a textured bumper. The midsole is white with a black stripe running along its length, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in blue, red, and white. The back of the shoe displays the 'ALL★STAR' branding on the heel tab, and the overall condition appears clean with minimal signs of wear.
description: Off-white high-top Converse sneaker with green laces, rubber toe cap, and visible All Star branding. Features a classic canvas upper and circular logo patch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green criss-cross laces, white rubber toe cap, and the symmetrical high-top shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth canvas upper, metal eyelets, and the black stripe on the white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'ALL★STAR' branding on the heel tab and the vertical seam running up the back.
description_view_3: Right side view features the circular Converse All Star logo patch and the full profile of the shoe's silhouette.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the inner side in blue, red, and white; 'ALL★STAR' text on the heel tab in black.
